title: Tensai Okamura
html:
Tensai Okamura (岡村 天斎), born as Yutaka Okamura (岡村 豊), was the director and storyboard artist for Episode 13 of the Evangelion TV Series. Okamura was also a director, storyboard artist and key animator in other works such as Cowboy Bebop, Rahxephon, Full Metal Panic, Ghost in the Shell, and Wolf's Rain.


This article bears the unpleasant designation of "Stub." This is a Bad Thing. Provide a great service to NGE fan-geeks everywhere by making it awesomer!
